prompt_text:
### Demographics: 48-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Major Depressive Disorder
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (mother)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 85.6 kg; Height 166.2 cm; BMI 31.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 119/70 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.6%; 9 months ago 7.2%; 6 months ago 7.2%; 3 months ago 7.5%; current 5.7%), FPG (12 months ago 194mg/dL; 9 months ago 144mg/dL; 6 months ago 159mg/dL; 3 months ago 157mg/dL; current 127mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 85.2kg; 9 months ago 84.9kg; 6 months ago 84.9kg; 3 months ago 81.7kg; current 85.6kg), Height (12 months ago 166.2cm; 9 months ago 166.2cm; 6 months ago 166.2cm; 3 months ago 166.2cm; current 166.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 31.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 122mmHg; 9 months ago 121mmHg; 6 months ago 122mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 119mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 68mmHg; 6 months ago 71mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 70mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 19U/L; 6 months ago 19U/L; 3 months ago 12U/L; current 16U/L), AST (12 months ago 12U/L; 9 months ago 16U/L; 6 months ago 10U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 13U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 35mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 34mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 33mL/min/1.73m²; current 34mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 242mg/g; 9 months ago 262mg/g; 6 months ago 282mg/g; 3 months ago 408mg/g; current 223mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 91mg/dL; 9 months ago 96mg/dL; 6 months ago 98mg/dL; 3 months ago 90mg/dL; current 94mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 50mg/dL; 6 months ago 53mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 51mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 137mg/dL; 9 months ago 138mg/dL; 6 months ago 155mg/dL; 3 months ago 137mg/dL; current 144mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 12.2g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
